visual_mood: Massive white typography on deep navy background -- sunglasses positioned in front of the text, partially obscuring letters, creating real depth

layout.composition: Giant 3-word headline centered. Sunglasses in front of the text at center, partially covering the middle letters. Text physically extends behind the product. Small tagline below. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline massive (60% of canvas), tagline small, logo small
layout.background: Solid deep navy -- complements the cool blue lens tones

product.placement: Positioned in front of the headline text at center -- the product partially obscures the letters 'THE', proving product and text were photographed together in one studio setup. Product casts a subtle shadow onto the text behind it.
product.instruction: The sunglasses should look like a real pair photographed in this studio composition -- matching the style shown in the reference image. Lit by the same soft overhead light, casting shadow onto the text behind. Not composited.

brand.color_scheme: Solid deep navy background complementing the cool blue lenses, bold white headline text, light gray tagline

prompt: A studio composition where massive typography and sunglasses are photographed together as one cohesive image on a solid deep navy background. Huge white bold italic text 'OWN THE SUN.' in the typeface from the font reference fills 60% of the canvas. Bandits Blue sunglasses from DuberyMNL are positioned in front of the text at center -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image, partially obscuring the word 'THE', casting a soft shadow onto the letters behind. Both text and product lit by the same soft overhead studio light. Small light gray tagline 'DUBERY POLARIZED' below. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, high contrast, minimal.
